title: Brasiliorchis picta
taxonomy: Brasiliorchis picta is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is native to Brazil, which explains its genus name Brasiliorchis. Brasiliorchis picta is a species within the genus Brasiliorchis. The classification of Brasiliorchis picta is within the subfamily Orchidoideae.
